journal-before-dispatch.description: A durable intent or suspension row is committed before any external side effect is dispatched.

idempotent-by-key.description: The effect accepts a stable idempotency key and replay uses the same key.

pure-read.description: The tool has no external side effects beyond repeatable reads.

unsafe.description: The tool can perform an unjournaled or nondeterministic side effect.

surfaces.notes: Built-in title mutation is disabled for model replay unless a subclass filters or reclassifies it.
agent_method_suspensions rows are written before channel.callMethod dispatch.
Replay-safe only when invoked through the agent suspension ledger.
Replay-safe only when invoked through the agent suspension ledger.
Filesystem mutations need journal-before-dispatch wrapping before model replay can be enabled.
Network reads are nondeterministic and may consume quota; classify per provider before replay.
Dynamically loaded tools are unsafe until they declare replay semantics.
